warnings: 55 Jordan: no listings captured on 2026-06-30 (last seen 2026-06-25) — excluded from current averages; site may have been unreachable or empty (check the Actions log).

data_quality.policy: Units failing hard invariants (net > asking, implausible rents) are excluded from every average and listed as errors.

unit_mix_sourced.label: Unit mix — sourced only
unit_mix_sourced.note: Bedroom-type census across the 10 comps with real unit-by-unit mix data: 4 from the client HelloData export (The Journal, Urby, MetroVue, Orchard), 5 recovered from Jersey City Planning Board approval records (Journal Squared, 425 Summit, The Greyson, 505 Summit, 345 Baldwin), and 3 Journal Square from an operator unit-mix export (PID 167470, 240 units). 413 Summit and 55 Jordan remain estimated and are excluded. Note: Journal Squared's mix is from a plan-set table marked preliminary, and 505 Summit's approved count is 607 vs 605 marketed.

live_market_survey.label: Live market survey — selected market total
live_market_survey.note: From the workbook's Live Market Survey tab (SELECTED MARKET TOTAL), 11 included buildings; CMPND co-living excluded. $/SF figures are annualized.
